items.definition_en: A wine glass is a stemmed glass used to drink wine.
items.example_en: He filled his wine glass before dinner.

items.definition_en: A water goblet is a large, stemmed glass used for water.
items.example_en: A water goblet was set at each place at the table.

items.definition_en: A salad plate is a small plate for serving salad.
items.example_en: Place the salad plate to the left of the main plate.

items.definition_en: A bread plate is a small dish used for bread and butter.
items.example_en: She put a roll on her bread plate.

items.definition_en: A soup plate is a deep plate used to serve soup.
items.example_en: He poured the tomato soup into his soup plate.

items.definition_en: A demitasse cup is a small cup used for serving espresso.
items.example_en: She sipped coffee from a demitasse cup.

items.definition_en: An egg cup is a small cup for holding a boiled egg upright.
items.example_en: He placed a soft-boiled egg in the egg cup.

items.definition_en: A bread basket is a container for serving bread at the table.
items.example_en: She put slices of bread in the bread basket.

items.definition_en: A soup tureen is a large, deep serving dish for soup.
items.example_en: The waiter brought the soup tureen to the table.

items.definition_en: A side plate is a small plate used for side dishes or bread.
items.example_en: He placed his salad on the side plate.

items.definition_en: A charger plate is a large decorative base for other plates.
items.example_en: Charger plates decorated the dinner table.

items.definition_en: A fish knife is a special knife for eating fish.
items.example_en: They set a fish knife next to the dinner plate.

items.definition_en: A dessert fork is a small fork used to eat dessert.
items.example_en: She ate her cake with a dessert fork.

items.definition_en: An oyster fork is a small, narrow fork for eating shellfish.
items.example_en: He picked up the oyster fork to try the shellfish.

items.definition_en: A cake server is a tool for serving slices of cake.
items.example_en: She used the cake server to serve the birthday cake.

items.definition_en: A cream jug is a small pitcher for serving cream.
items.example_en: Please pass the cream jug for my coffee.

items.definition_en: An espresso cup is a small cup used for espresso coffee.
items.example_en: He ordered an espresso in a small espresso cup.

items.definition_en: A placemat is a small mat placed under a plate on a table.
items.example_en: Each setting had a red placemat.

items.definition_en: A coaster is a small mat to protect a surface from a drink.
items.example_en: He put a coaster under his glass of juice.

items.definition_en: A milk jug is a small jug for serving milk.
items.example_en: The milk jug was next to the sugar bowl.
